cells.rationale: Reworks integrateRepoUnderLease so trunk integration runs in a private scratch worktree while preserving subtle correctness invariants: temp worktree+branch removed on every exit path, no MERGE_HEAD ever visible in the shared checkout, lease acquire/release semantics, and all existing typed outcomes; it must also design a new visible self-clearing typed outcome for the deferred-ff case. Contract-shaped finalize logic where a wrong abstraction propagates into the distress/paging machinery — opus for the invariant/contract reasoning, xhigh for contract-touching depth.

Test matrix over the deferred-ff edge paths (dirty-tracked, untracked, off-branch, racing origin, conflict, gate-red) via the pure seams task 1 establishes, plus docs updates to problem-codes.md, the close skill prose, and CONTEXT.md vocabulary. Bulk is pattern-following, but the repo's strict docs discipline (forward-facing only, prune-not-append, no history narration) and vocabulary alignment need delicate idiom-matching — sonnet over a GPT tier; no opus-level invariant work since task 1 owns the invariants. High for multi-file known-pattern execution.
